edges.label: principle promoted here
edges.context: The perception-not-vocabulary principle was promoted from auto-memory into this implementation node's content/ directory during the 2026-04-08 audit. Shape what figures perceive; don't prescribe how they express it.

edges.label: principle promoted here
edges.context: The figure-sensitivity-mutual-learning principle (context sensitivity evolves through play, figures attune to cross-figure substrate) was promoted from auto-memory into this node's content/ directory during the 2026-04-08 audit.

edges.label: principle promoted here
edges.context: The ecological-state-interfaces principle was promoted from auto-memory into the cross-app docs node during the 2026-04-08 audit — durable state that belongs across apps lives here rather than in any single app's implementation notes.

edges.label: principle promoted here
edges.context: The harness-layering framework (CLI → protocol → SDK, built in that order) was extracted from iteration 06 into a standalone content file during the 2026-04-08 audit so it is discoverable without having to read the iteration artifact.

edges.label: principles promoted here
edges.context: Two principle files were extracted into this pipeline's content/ during the 2026-04-08 audit: pipeline-design-learnings.md (four meta-principles from iteration 17) and prose-craft-dimensions.md (four craft dimensions the pipeline is aimed at). Both replace scattered memory entries.

edges.label: principle promoted here
edges.context: The cross-modality-insight-flow principle (slower modalities surface structural gaps in faster ones) was promoted from auto-memory into the concepts layer during the 2026-04-08 audit — a meta-principle about ecosystem design belonged here.

edges.label: surfaced during
edges.context: These frictions were discovered while testing workspace setup during the gesture review session

nodes.title: Knowledge Layers — Memory, Concepts, Rules, and Durable Knowledge
